Description: Report whether syndicated loan commitment is single signed, dual signed, closed but not settled, or closed and settled. For non-syndicated loans, report 0 (NA).
For syndicated pipeline loans (Options 1-3 in Field 100), report percentage of total commitment BHC/IHC/SLHC intends to hold. If option 0 or 4 in Field 100, report NA.
Allowable Values: Decimal to 4 places (e.g. 0.05%=0.0005). No scientific notation. NA if option 0 or 4 in Field 100.

Description: Report allowance for credit losses per ASC 326-20. Provide at credit facility level if available, otherwise pro-rated allocation from collective (pool).
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount (e.g. 20000000). No dollar sign, commas, or decimals. 0 if no reserve.

Description: If PCD asset, report noncredit discount/premium per ASC 326-20-30-13. Credit facility level if available, otherwise pro-rated from pool. Leave blank if not PCD.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount. No dollar sign, commas, or decimals.

Description: Report maturity date exclusive of extension options. Demand loans = 9999-01-01. Syndicated pipeline: estimated maturity per commitment letter. Non-syndicated commitments to commit: estimated maturity per terms.
For HFS and FVO loans: report total commitment amount per credit agreement. If not HFS or FVO: report NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.

Description: For HFS and FVO loans: report outstanding funded exposure. If not HFS or FVO: report NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.

Description: For HFS and FVO loans: report fair value of entire credit facility. If not HFS or FVO: report NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.

Description: For HFS and FVO loans: report fair value of outstanding funded exposure. If not HFS or FVO: report NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount. No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. Negative sign for negatives. NA if not HFS/FVO.

Description: Report 20-character alphanumeric LEI of obligor in Field 4 if available. LEIs issued by LOUs of Global LEI System. If not applicable, report NA.
If primary source of repayment entity differs from obligor in Field 4, report LEI of entity in Field 50. If same as obligor, leave blank. If no LEI, report NA.
Allowable Values: Valid 20-char alphanumeric LEI or NA. Blank if same as obligor in Field 2.
